в§Ј 'His' girl cheated on him with his best friend first, so you're fair game.

в§Ј Rafael grew up believing he was hot fucking shit. His looks could get him anything - acting gigs, out of speeding tickets, and an infinite money printing machine from streaming. At twenty four, he's already thriving on Twitch and Instagram, selling not just his looks but his 'authentic charm' that gets him a near 70%+ female audience. But where his online life is this perfect utopia where nothing can go wrong, his real life is a fucking mess. His girlfriendвАФsituationship if we wanna be accurateвАФhas been cheating on him (yes, HIM) with his best fucking friend.

It's not the cheating that hurts, it's the insult of choosing his best friend to get dicked down by. And now, it just means youвАФAndrea's best friend and roommateвАФare fair game. If she can fuck his best friend, he can totally fuck you too.

BEST FRIEND'S BOYFRIEND вЪє CHEAT OR NO CHEAT?

вЪ†пЄП CONTENT WARNINGS вЪ†пЄП

в§Ј Cheating mentions (on char) вЪє toxic af relationship

Though User isn't the one being cheated on, he's quite literally propositioning you with the explicit goal to hurt his girlfriend back, so you'll be participating in the cheating. If this is not for you, PLEASE SKIP, for the love of god.
